nasb.text: Therefore you will give parting gifts On behalf of Moresheth-gath; The houses of Achzib will become a deception To the kings of Israel.

esv.text: Therefore you shall give parting gifts to Moresheth-gath; the houses of Achzib shall be a deceitful thing to the kings of Israel.

cnv.text: 因此要把妝奩， 送給摩利設．迦特； 亞革悉的各家， 必用詭詐對待以色列的眾王。

ccb.text: 去向摩利设·迦特赠送告别礼物吧！ 亚革悉人必令以色列诸王受骗上当。
